task.title: Import session report as read-only preview

requirements.description: Read a session report JSON from clipboard and show it as read-only preview in the lab page without mutating current working state.
acceptance: Import report preview action exists in lab page
Clipboard JSON of type lab-session-report can be parsed and rendered in preview card
Invalid clipboard payloads produce clear status hints
